summary: Functional cleanup script with correct policies, but significant best-practices gaps: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (critical security violation per evaluation criteria), actionlint binary downloaded without integrity verification, workflow missing self-validation step. Test harness uses brittle hardcoded test numbers (ok 4, ok 6, ok 10...) that break if test order changes. Artifact-cleanup.sh lacks input validation for numeric args. Positive: bash conventions (set -euo pipefail, quoting) solid, clear error messages, reasonable error propagation. Jq pipelines functional but lack comments explaining complex operations.
